cloud.title: Connect to Airbnk / WeHere cloud
cloud.description: Use the Airbnk or WeHere account email that can access this lock. Cloud access is used only during setup to fetch bootstrap data; normal lock control stays local over Bluetooth. The mobile app may sign out when the same account is reused.

data_description.email: Use the Airbnk or WeHere account email that can access this lock. This cloud login is only for setup, and the lock runs locally over Bluetooth afterwards. Plus-address aliases are supported.

cloud_verify.title: Enter verification code
cloud_verify.description: Enter the verification code that Airbnk or WeHere emailed to {email}.

data_description.auth_code: Airbnk or WeHere emails a one-time verification code to the address from the previous step.

cloud_lock.title: Choose a lock
cloud_lock.description: Select which Airbnk or WeHere lock to import from the authenticated account.

data_description.selected_lock: Only supported Airbnk or WeHere lock models with local BLE profiles are shown here.

manual.title: Manual bootstrap
manual.description: Enter the bootstrap values for one Airbnk or WeHere lock. These raw values are used only to derive local keys and are not stored.

data_description.name: Friendly lock name shown in Home Assistant.
data_description.lock_sn: Use the Airbnk or WeHere lock serial number exactly as shown in the app or your existing tooling.
data_description.new_sninfo: Paste the raw newSninfo value. It is used only during setup and is not stored afterwards.
data_description.app_key: Paste the raw appKey value. It is used only during setup and is not stored afterwards.

confirm_lock.title: Finish setup
confirm_lock.description: Configure the local Bluetooth settings for serial {serial} ({model}).

data_description.name: Friendly name shown for this lock in Home Assistant.
data_description.lock_icon: Optional icon override for this lock in Home Assistant. Leave it empty to keep the default state-aware lock icons, or pick a mailbox icon to restore the old mailbox look.
data_description.discovered_address: Prefer the Bluetooth address Home Assistant has already discovered for this lock.
data_description.mac_address: Only needed if Home Assistant could not match this lock automatically.
data_description.reverse_commands: Turn this on only if lock and unlock actions appear reversed on your hardware.
data_description.supports_remote_lock: Turn this on only for models that support a separate remote lock command.
data_description.retry_count: How many extra BLE command attempts Home Assistant should make after the first try.
data_description.command_timeout: How long Home Assistant should wait for each BLE command attempt before giving up.
data_description.connectivity_probe_interval: Optional background BLE reachability check. Set this to 0 to disable active probing.
data_description.unavailable_after: How long the lock can stay quiet before Home Assistant marks it unavailable.

rediscover_bluetooth.title: Refresh Bluetooth address
rediscover_bluetooth.description: Pick a newly discovered Bluetooth address for {device_name}, or enter one manually.

data_description.discovered_address: Choose the Bluetooth address Home Assistant currently sees for this lock.
data_description.mac_address: Use this only if discovery still cannot match the lock automatically.

cloud_refresh.title: Refresh from Airbnk / WeHere cloud
cloud_refresh.description: Request a fresh verification code for the Airbnk or WeHere account that can access this lock. This is only used to refresh local bootstrap data; normal lock control remains local over Bluetooth.

data_description.email: Use the Airbnk or WeHere account email that can access this lock. This cloud login is only for bootstrap refresh, and the lock continues to run locally over Bluetooth.

cloud_refresh_verify.title: Enter verification code
cloud_refresh_verify.description: Enter the verification code that Airbnk or WeHere emailed to {email}.

data_description.auth_code: Airbnk or WeHere emails a one-time verification code to the address from the previous step.

manual_refresh.title: Refresh from manual bootstrap
manual_refresh.description: Enter fresh bootstrap values for lock {serial}. These raw values are used only to derive local keys and are not stored.

data_description.new_sninfo: Paste the refreshed raw newSninfo value for this lock. It is not stored afterwards.
data_description.app_key: Paste the refreshed raw appKey value for this lock. It is not stored afterwards.

error.code_request_failed: Could not request a verification code from the Airbnk / WeHere cloud.
error.invalid_address: Enter a valid Airbnk / WeHere Bluetooth MAC address.
error.invalid_lock_icon: Enter a valid Material Design icon name such as mdi:mailbox-up-outline.
error.invalid_airbnk_bootstrap: The Airbnk / WeHere bootstrap data could not be decrypted or did not match this lock.
error.lock_mismatch: The manual bootstrap serial number does not match the discovered Airbnk / WeHere lock.
error.token_retrieval_failed: Could not authenticate with the Airbnk / WeHere cloud.

abort.already_configured: This Airbnk / WeHere lock is already configured.
abort.another_device: The refreshed bootstrap belongs to a different Airbnk / WeHere lock.
abort.cannot_connect: The requested Airbnk / WeHere operation could not be completed.
abort.invalid_airbnk_bootstrap: The Airbnk / WeHere bootstrap data could not be decrypted or did not match this lock.
abort.lock_not_found: The selected Airbnk / WeHere lock could not be found in the authenticated account.
abort.no_supported_locks: No supported Airbnk / WeHere locks were found for this account.
abort.not_airbnk_device: The discovered Bluetooth device is not a supported Airbnk / WeHere lock.

data_description.name: Friendly name shown for this lock in Home Assistant.
data_description.lock_icon: Optional icon override for this lock in Home Assistant. Leave it empty to keep the default state-aware lock icons, or pick a mailbox icon to restore the old mailbox look.
data_description.reverse_commands: Turn this on only if lock and unlock actions appear reversed on your hardware.
data_description.supports_remote_lock: Turn this on only for models that support a separate remote lock command.
data_description.retry_count: How many extra BLE command attempts Home Assistant should make after the first try.
data_description.command_timeout: How long Home Assistant should wait for each BLE command attempt before giving up.
data_description.connectivity_probe_interval: Optional background BLE reachability check. Set this to 0 to disable active probing.
data_description.unavailable_after: How long the lock can stay quiet before Home Assistant marks it unavailable.

error.invalid_lock_icon: Enter a valid Material Design icon name such as mdi:mailbox-up-outline.
